headline_findings: Best loaded strict ideal-SQR process fidelity: 0.99899.
Original baseline best direct average gate fidelity remained 0.7245.
Native-rich best strict process reached 0.99899, confirming that strict ideal SQR is achievable on selected addressed windows.
Native-rich best CPSQR process reached 0.999999998, confirming that echoed gains are strongest for the relaxed conditional-phase target.
The structured native-rich best-by-case mean strict fidelity is 0.8392, so the current corpus still falls short of the user's 0.95 grid-average landmark.

checks.name: baseline_best_direct_matches_expected_scale
checks.expected_comment: Baseline direct strict process should remain around 0.65 process fidelity / 0.72 average gate fidelity.

checks.name: native_rich_reaches_strict_gt_0p99
checks.expected_comment: The native-rich extension should exceed 0.99 on at least one strict ideal-SQR case.

checks.name: native_rich_reaches_cpsqr_gt_0p999
checks.expected_comment: The native-rich extension should show near-unit CPSQR on echoed cases.

checks.name: row_count_by_study
checks.expected_comment: All four source studies must load into the definitive aggregation.

convergence.note: This definitive-study pass aggregates source-study convergence/sanity artifacts. No new cross-study convergence rerun was performed in this iteration.
